author: @Sirenir1
text: Been binge waching a lot of your content< I notice those shredder blades look like the mixers in your diagram for mass batching. could you in theory make a "not soo mass" batcher for plastics with this? I have to say though, you are a completely under rated content creator. this is the class I always needed in high school, realising that now 15 years later. Keep up the good work!

author: @donscottvansandt4139
text: It doesn't seem like it would be to hard to turn the piston section into a waterpump but it's probably not stainless so would rust? But very cool and sparksthe imagination...

author: @travismoore7849
text: Oh it has a scotch yoke piston.

author: @VeniceInventors
text: For the lathe I'd suggest looking at sewing machine motors that come with a speed control pedal. They're really cheap and suitable to power all sorts of things like a saw, pottery wheel, coil winder, etc

text:

author: @ibme8359
text: One of my favorites too, salvage "whatever" and chuck the rest! Yes we do get a bit "down 'n dirty" ! And sometimes you might say, "Wow that's just what I can use on that gadget I've been working on"! ONE OF MY FAVORITE RMS Videos! Thank You,Thank You, Very Much!!!

author: @dav1dbone
text: Fridge compressor:The oil I've heard is nasty, probably one reason the scrapyard doesn't want them. Not being a killjoy but caution handling the oil

author: @Teknopottu
text: Loved this video. There is so much well engineered, durable and easily repurposable stuff.

author: @TomFarrell-p9z
text: Taking apart and figuring out things to do with discarded machines are my favorite of the TnT videos!

author: @jamest.5001
text: It would not be impossible to build a gas/propane/steam generator from a fridge compressor,  its going to be about 500 watts  or so!

replies.author: @Teknopottu
replies.text: Steam generator was my first thought when I saw the compressor disassembled. Maybe some day I get to put my own boiler and generator together.

author: @calvingreene90
text: Refrigeration pumps are usually pretty good vacuum pumps.

author: @Vibe77Guy
text: There are quite a few videos on turning compressors into internal combustion engines. Automotive AC compressors are especially interesting in that they can essentially be converted into the INNegine design, driving the swash plate.
